title: scabiosa succisa var. glabrata
intro: Scabiosa succisa var. glabrata, also known as the Field Scabious, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its blue to purple flowers and feathery foliage. The medicinal properties of Scabiosa succisa var. glabrata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions and wounds. Scabiosa succisa var. glabrata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the flowers and leaves being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
